title: Sky Villages
description: Explore massive and beautiful villages in the sky!
body:
![enter image description here](https://i.imgur.com/SiO5ANY.png)Yes, that's right! Villages in the land of clouds! Explore massive and beautiful villages in the sky!
These villages generate entirely randomly on your world, and each of these sky towns will have a distinctive and unique look!
This mod is currently under steady development. New villages/content will be added in each update.


Requires Cloth Config API (Fabric) and Fabric API.

### Planned Content

- Sky castles (for villagers)
- Ruined sky villages
- Sky village ports with little flying ships, end city ship style
